class.name: BTRunPlanner
class.brief_description: Runs the temporal goal task planner and writes the plan to the blackboard.
class.description: Reads state from the Blackboard (via optional PlannerState), gets the todo list from [member todo_list_var], and calls PlannerPlan.find_plan. On success writes plan, plan_index, and solution_graph to the blackboard.

members.member: Blackboard variable name for the todo list.
